_patch_meta.description: Dimension anchor patch — C01 (mind, Soul, heart, spirit, flesh, being): sets manual_override = 1 for 293 groups whose dimension assignment is analytically unambiguous. 4 groups left open: 1081-001 (dialogismos evil thoughts — Cognitive/Mind vs Moral/Conscience), 1174-001 (cha.shav design — Volitional/Capacity vs Cognitive/Mind), 3338-001 (chish.sha.von schemes — Moral/Conscience vs Cognitive/Mind), 4331-001 (ha.lal madness — Moral/Conscience vs Cognitive/Mind). These remain at manual_override = 0 pending researcher decision.
